titolo: Traiettoria della Ricorsione nel Piano Complesso
contenuto: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 500" style="background-color: #07080d;"><defs><linearGradient id="grad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#00b4d8;stop-opacity:0.8" /><stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#38b000;stop-opacity:0.8" /></linearGradient><filter id="glow"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="coloredBlur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter></defs><g stroke="#1f2430" stroke-width="1"><line x1="100" y1="250" x2="700" y2="250" /><line x1="400" y1="50" x2="400" y2="450" /><circle cx="400" cy="250" r="180" fill="none" stroke="#2a324b" stroke-dasharray="4,4" /></g><path d="M 400 250 Q 480 180 520 220 T 350 310 T 460 140 T 280 280 T 550 250" fill="none" stroke="url(#grad1)" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#glow)" /><circle cx="400" cy="250" r="4" fill="#d4a373" /><circle cx="520" cy="220" r="5" fill="#ffb703" filter="url(#glow)" /><circle cx="350" cy="310" r="5" fill="#00b4d8" filter="url(#glow)" /><circle cx="460" cy="140" r="5" fill="#38b000" filter="url(#glow)" /><text x="410" y="240" fill="#8d99ae" font-family="monospace" font-size="12">z(0)</text><text x="530" y="215" fill="#ffb703" font-family="monospace" font-size="12">z(1)</text><text x="330" y="325" fill="#00b4d8" font-family="monospace" font-size="12">z(2)</text><text x="470" y="135" fill="#38b000" font-family="monospace" font-size="12">z(3)</text><text x="400" y="430" text-anchor="middle" fill="#80ed99" font-family="monospace" font-size="18" filter="url(#glow)">z(t + 1) = z(t)² + c</text><text x="400" y="460" text-anchor="middle" fill="#5c677d" font-family="monospace" font-size="12">Ricorsione Discreta e Confine dell'Attrattore</text></svg>
